name: Appetizer Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions until they are softened and lightly browned.
2. Beat the egg in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, combine the milk, Bisquick, sautéed onions, and one cup of grated Cheddar cheese.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
5. Sprinkle the remaining cup of grated Cheddar cheese on top of the quiche filling.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes, or until set and golden brown on top.
7. The quiche can be prepared in advance and reheated when ready to serve.
This recipe is from "One Million Recipes CD" by Judy R.
